news.summary: A recent study revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.6% in April, which is the lowest it has been in over 50 years. This decrease is attributed to the addition of 573,000 jobs in the same month. The job gains were seen across multiple sectors, with the leisure and hospitality industry leading the way by adding 331,000 jobs. The strong job market has also led to an increase in average hourly earnings by 0.7%, bringing the total to $30.17. Additionally, the labor force participation rate saw a slight increase to 61.9%. Experts are optimistic about the continued recovery of the economy as more Americans reenter the workforce.
news.headline: Zambia's bumper corn harvest may help lower inflation rates.

news.summary: In Irvine, California on May 22, 2025, Biomerica, Inc. (NASDAQ: BMRA) revealed strong real-world data showcasing the efficacy of its inFoods® IBS solution. The company also introduced a new real-time patient feedback tool to bolster symptom monitoring and enhance patient results.
news.headline: Biomerica reports 49% reduction in IBS symptoms with inFoods® IBS, introduces real-time patient feedback system.
CHINA VOWS COOPERATION WITH CENTRAL, EASTERN EUROPEAN NATIONS

news.summary: Novi, a prominent technology platform in San Francisco, has revealed an expanding partnership with NielsenIQ (NIQ), a global leader in consumer intelligence. This collaboration involves integrating NIQ’s Label Insight data into Novi’s platform, enhancing its current ingredient-level and product attribute datasets. By merging this data, brands will have improved capabilities in identifying and engaging with **more** effectively target audiences. This development signifies a significant advancement in empowering retailers and brands to promote products that are beneficial for consumers and the environment.
news.headline: Novi partners with NielsenIQ to integrate Label Insight data, enhancing product trust for sustainable brands.

news.summary: In Amsterdam, a new app called Sling Money has been introduced, offering fast and affordable global money transfers. The app has recently launched US and EU Virtual Accounts, enabling users to receive payments in US dollars and euros. This development aims to provide users with more convenient options for receiving funds in these currencies.
news.headline: Sling Money launches US/EU Virtual Accounts via Bridge partnership to expand global earning capabilities.

news.summary: Istaroxime has successfully finished two favorable Phase 2 trials for SCAI Stage B cardiogenic shock. The SEISMiC C study for SCAI Stage C cardiogenic shock marks a significant advancement towards the Phase 3 program for istaroxime in cardiogenic shock.
news.headline: Windtree Therapeutics plans interim analysis for Istaroxime Cardiogenic Shock Phase 2 study in July 2025. Previous Phase 2 studies yielded positive results in SCAI Stage B cardiogenic shock. Transitioning to Phase 3 program with SEISMiC C study in SCAI Stage C.

news.summary: NorthStrive Biosciences has completed a Phase I strategic review for their EL-22 product, which aims to combat muscle loss linked to GLP-1 weight loss medications and aging. The review involved analyzing data from 200 participants and evaluating the drug's effectiveness in preventing muscle wasting. This key milestone marks progress in the development of EL-22 and signifies a step forward in addressing the negative side effects of popular weight loss drugs. This advancement underscores NorthStrive's commitment to creating innovative solutions for health-related challenges.
news.headline: NorthStrive Biosciences completes Phase I review for EL-22 targeting muscle loss with GLP-1 drugs & sarcopenia.

news.summary: A company is utilizing over two decades of drug response information gathered from a vast biobank of live cell tumor samples. With more than twenty years' worth of data available, the company is leveraging valuable insights to enhance their research and development efforts. This extensive database of drug response data, extracted from a large collection of live cell tumor samples, is playing a crucial role in informing the company's strategies for developing new treatments and improving existing ones.
news.headline: AI in oncology with $256M 23andMe buy, leverages 20yrs drug response data from biobank of tumor samples.

news.summary: Successful completion of the sea trial has validated our capability to conduct continuous testing 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year on both the East and West Coast.
news.headline: Ocean Power Technologies finishes first sea trial for WAM-V®s at US Coast Guard test site; confirms 24/7 testing on East/West Coasts.

news.summary: Bitcoin has recently reached a new all-time high above $111,000 due to increasing institutional interest, limited supply, and favorable economic conditions. Despite the positive momentum, experts are warning about potential risks, such as the looming threat of quantum computing. The digital currency hit a record of $111,544 on Wednesday, showcasing its attractiveness to institutions amidst supportive macroeconomic factors. Currently, Bitcoin is trading at around $111,000, marking a 1% increase for the day. Other major cryptocurrencies like Ethereum, Solana, XRP, and BNB have also seen gains of 5%, 6%, 3.4%, and 4.6%, respectively. The market sentiment is at 72, approaching extreme greed levels, which could make the market vulnerable to corrections, especially with the ongoing U.S. government bond sell-off. Analysts emphasize that the rally is being primarily driven by actual demand and substantial ETF investments, rather than speculative trading. According to Bitget Research's Chief Analyst, the situation reflects a shift towards sustainable growth.
news.headline: Bitcoin hits record high above $111,000 fueled by institutional demand. Analysts caution on risks, including quantum computing.

news.summary: Cetus, a DEX on the Sui blockchain, reportedly fell victim to an exploit resulting in over $200 million worth of digital assets being drained. The exploit was revealed by Web3 researcher COMDARE3, with Cetus assets losing significant value, like LBTC and AXOL. The alleged exploiter's address holds large amounts of Sui, HASUI, TOILET, USDT, among others. Cetus stated a protocol incident was detected, pausing the smart contract for safety, but doubts on transparency were raised by analysts and compliance firms. AMLBot highlighted concerns over how the incident was labeled a bug, questioning the timing of massive fund transfers to Ethereum, totaling $212 million. Onchain Lens reported the attacker took control of SUI pools, exploiting over $200M and also moving USDC. Ongoing updates are expected in this evolving situation.
news.headline: Decentralized exchange Sui DEX Cetus potentially hacked, with $200 million in digital assets lost. Transparency concerns raised.

news.summary: In Chicago on May 22, 2025, the renowned cannabis seltzer brand Wynk™ unveiled Mandarin Pomelo, a new summer flavor, designed to enhance gatherings. This limited-time release is tailored for various social events, such as backyard BBQs or poolside lounging. The product aims to cater to the increasing consumer interest in unique cannabis-infused beverages.
news.headline: Wynk launches limited-edition Mandarin Pomelo cannabis seltzer for summer; perfect for get-togethers.

news.summary: In Dallas today, o9, a prominent enterprise AI software platform provider known for revolutionizing planning and decision-making, was acknowledged in the 2025 Gartner® Critical Capabilities for Supply Chain Planning Solutions. Impressively, the report positioned o9 in the top five providers for Demand Planning, Supply Planning, and E2E Enterprise Planning Use Cases. Renowned for its o9 Digital Brain platform, which facilitates integrated business planning, o9 drives decision-making processes for major global corporations.
news.headline: o9's AI platform recognized in Gartner's 2025 report, as a top five provider for demand planning, supply planning, and E2E planning.

news.summary: Arqit Quantum Inc. has reported its financial results for the first half of fiscal year 2025, with revenue reaching $67,000 for the period ending 31 March 2025. Despite delays affecting revenue generation from a multi-year enterprise license contract, Arqit remains optimistic about future recurring revenue expected to reach seven figures annually. Operating costs averaged $2.4 million per month, with the company holding $24.8 million in cash and cash equivalents as of 31 March 2025. Recent developments include a contract with the U.S. Department of Defense and partnerships for integrating Arqit's technology into enterprise and government security solutions. Additionally, Arqit signed a contract with a Tier 1 network operator spanning 32 countries and collaborated with Intel and Equus Compute Solutions on quantum-safe technology for classified mobile communications. These developments showcase Arqit's growing presence in the cybersecurity market.
news.headline: Arqit Quantum Inc. reports $67,000 revenue for the first half of fiscal year 2025, with $2.4 million monthly operating costs. Key developments include contracts with US DoD and large IT vendor.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Arqit Quantum Inc. (Nasdaq: ARQQ), a prominent provider of quantum-safe encryption solutions, released their financial performance for the initial six months of fiscal year 2025.
news.headline: Arqit Quantum Inc. (Nasdaq: ARQQ) reports financial results for H1 of FY2025, a leader in quantum-safe encryption.

news.summary: A company based in Farmington Hills, Michigan, MDT, has recently published a new whitepaper aimed at assisting credit unions in identifying and addressing operational inefficiencies, as well as improving overall efficiency.
news.headline: MDT provides strategies to improve credit union efficiencies; whitepaper focuses on unlocking new levels of performance.

news.summary: A digital banking solutions company named Apiture from Wilmington, North Carolina, has been acknowledged by Celent, a research and advisory firm, in the 2025 XCelent Awards. The recognition highlights Apiture's excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Apiture wins 2025 XCelent Award from Celent for standout functionality in digital banking solutions.

news.summary: In a press release dated May 22, 2025, Toronto-based pharmaceutical company MediPharm Labs Corp. (TSX: LABS) revealed the successful fulfillment of all conditions precedent for the sale of its Hope Facility in Hope, BC, to Rubicon Organics Inc. (TSXV: ROMJ) (OTCQX: ROMJF) for $4.5 million in cash. This transaction marks a significant step for MediPharm, known for its expertise in precision-based cannabinoids.
news.headline: MediPharm sells Hope Facility for $4.5M to Rubicon Organics, on track to close sale in June, reaching key milestone.
US 5- TO 30-YEAR YIELD CURVE STEEPENS TO 100 BASIS POINTS

news.summary: Bottomline, a company based in Middleton, Massachusetts, has been recognized by the QKS Group SPARK Matrix™ as a technology leader in Insider Risk Management in 2025. The company's Insider Threat Management solution has received high ratings for its technology excellence and customer impact. Venkatesh Kopparthi, an analyst at QKS Group, highlighted Bottomline's Internal Threat Management (ITM) capabilities that capture user sessions in real time, utilize machine learning for behavioral analytics, and integrate seamlessly into security ecosystems for incident response. The QKS Group SPARK Matrix™ offers a comprehensive analysis of the global market dynamics, major trends, vendor landscape, and competitive positioning. The study provides strategic information for evaluating different vendor capabilities, competitive differentiation, and market positions in the Insider Risk Management sector.
news.headline: Bottomline named technology leader in Insider Risk Management by QKS Group, known for its Internal Threat Management capturing user sessions in real time with machine learning analytics. Detailed global market analysis revealed Bottomline's strong ratings in technology and customer impact, positioning it as a Leader in the SPARK Matrix™ for Insider Risk Management, 2025.

news.summary: Dr. Samanta recently received the Presidential Medal from the City University of New York in an event held in Bhubaneshwar, India on May 22, 2025. This recognition signifies a significant achievement for India, particularly Odisha. It highlights the esteemed status of the premier research institute at the university.
news.headline: CUNY establishes 'Achyuta Samanta India Initiative' Research Institute; Dr. Samanta honored with Presidential Medal. Odisha, May 22, 2025.

news.summary: In Seattle on May 22, 2025, Spectral Capital Corporation revealed the submission of 16 fresh provisional patent applications. This development has propelled their overall patent collection to 120. The newly filed patents cover advancements in machine learning and quantum computing, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and staying at the forefront of technological progress.
news.headline: Spectral Capital aims for 500 patents by June 30, 2025; currently has 120 patents including 16 new provisional applications.

news.summary: In Belgrade, Montana on May 22, 2025, Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings, Inc. revealed that it secured two 120-day task orders from the US Forest Service for its CL-415EAF “Super Scooper” aircraft. As one of the leading aerial firefighting companies in the country, Bridger Aerospace successfully acquired these contracts at the onset of the wildfire season. This marks a significant achievement as the orders are unprecedented in duration, lasting for a record-setting 120 days each. The Company, identified by the ticker symbols NASDAQ: BAER and BAERW, continues to demonstrate its commitment to combating wildfires effectively.
news.headline: Bridger Aerospace receives record 120-day task orders for 4 Super Scoopers from US Forest Service.

news.summary: Providence St. Joseph Hospital in Orange, California, was recently awarded the esteemed Magnet recognition®, known as the gold standard for nursing excellence. This honor places the hospital among an elite group of only 30 hospitals nationwide and just four in California to have achieved this prestigious designation. The Magnet recognition signifies the hospital's commitment to providing exceptional nursing care and adhering to the highest standards of excellence.
news.headline: Providence St. Joseph Hospital in Orange achieves Magnet Nursing Excellence With Distinction recognition, one of 4 in CA.

news.summary: During the summer months of 2025, Clear Channel Outdoor (NYSE: CCO) and Maricopa County will collaborate for the second consecutive year on a digital billboard campaign in Phoenix. The initiative aims to increase awareness and offer resources during the hottest months of the year. This partnership signifies a continued effort to assist the community.
news.headline: Clear Channel Outdoor & Maricopa County launch heat relief campaign in Phoenix for 2nd year, providing resources during hottest months. NYSE: CCO.

news.summary: The worldwide economy is encountering a more divided economic environment in the coming times. The announcement of tariffs by the US, along with escalating geopolitical tensions and general uncertainty surrounding economic policies, has led to a significant slowdown in global growth prospects. The regions of the Middle East and Africa are particularly impacted by these developments. The situation reflects a challenging scenario, with global growth rates projected to decrease by an estimated 2.5% in the upcoming year.
news.headline: Kearney predicts uncertain economic future with US tariffs and geopolitical risks slowing global growth.

news.summary: Three major companies, Caleres, FleetPride, and Freedom Furniture, have implemented Coveo's AI-Search technology to enhance product discovery and increase conversions. This collaboration was announced on May 22, 2025 in Montreal, London, and New York. Coveo is recognized as a leader in AI-Relevance, offering top-tier AI-search capabilities and generative experiences to improve customer engagement.
news.headline: Coveo AI enhances ecommerce for Caleres, FleetPride, and Freedom Furniture, boosting revenue growth and conversions.

news.summary: Ro is now providing new patients with Novo Nordisk's FDA-approved GLP-1 medication, Wegovy®, at a discounted cash price of $199 for the first month. This offer is the lowest cost available for this treatment. Patients can access this promotion through Ro starting today in New York.
news.headline: Ro offers new patients Wegovy® for $199 in first month, lowest cost FDA-approved GLP-1s - discounted body membership available.

news.summary: Today, in Pittsburgh, The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) revealed plans to release its quarterly earnings for the year 2026 before the market opens and conduct conference calls at 10 a.m. (ET) on specific dates. The company will kick off this routine with the First Quarter earnings release set for Wednesday, April 15, 2026. This move aims to provide investors and stakeholders with timely updates on the company's financial performance throughout the year.
news.headline: PNC Financial Group (NYSE: PNC) sets quarterly earnings release dates for 2026; 1st quarter on April 15 at 10 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In a recent report, it has been revealed that an estimated 15% of adults in the country are living below the poverty line, which amounts to approximately 45 million individuals. The report also states that the unemployment rate has increased to 8.5%, affecting around 12 million people. In addition, it highlights that the national debt has risen to $23 trillion, posing a significant economic challenge for policymakers. The report emphasizes the urgent need for government intervention to address these pressing issues and support those who are most vulnerable in society.
news.headline: Ed Chidsey is named President of Inovalon’s Insights Business Unit, leading strategic initiatives.

news.summary: BGC Group is scheduled to participate in the upcoming Piper Sandler Global Exchange & Trading Conference in New York on June 5, 2025. This event will provide a platform for BGC Group to showcase its expertise and strategies in the global exchange and trading sector. With a focus on networking and industry insights, the conference is expected to draw a large audience of professionals and investors. This conference presents a valuable opportunity for BGC Group to engage with key stakeholders and enhance its presence in the market.
news.headline: BGC Group will present at the Piper Sandler Global Exchange & Trading Conference on June 5, 2025 in New York.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Druva, a top data security provider, unveiled new protection measures for Azure SQL and Azure Blob Storage. These enhancements, part of Druva's collaboration with Microsoft, aim to assist businesses in minimizing risk, managing expenses, and enhancing operational flexibility through cloud-based data security. As companies seek to streamline their cybersecurity approaches, Druva presents a cohesive cloud-native solution spanning multiple regions, supporting their cyber resilience efforts.
news.headline: Druva boosts cyber resilience with Azure support, now offering protection for Azure SQL and Blob Storage.

news.summary: In New York and Burlington, Massachusetts, Butterfly Network, Inc. (NYSE: BFLY) revealed that Joseph DeVivo, who serves as the President, Chief Executive Officer, and Chairman, is set to lead a presentation and engage in individual investor consultations at the William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference. The event is scheduled for Thursday, June 5, 2025, at 8:00 am Central Time in Chicago, IL. This conference will involve discussions about Butterfly's offerings centered on handheld, whole-body ultrasound technology, and user-friendly software. The presentation will also be accessible via a live webcast.
news.headline: Butterfly Network (NYSE: BFLY) to present at William Blair conference on June 5, 2025, in Chicago at 8:00 am CT.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Pavilion Payments, a prominent omnichannel payment solutions provider in the gaming sector, has named Sarah Perry as Vice President of Gaming Operations. Perry, with over 20 years of experience handling delivery, operational strategy, and cross-functional programs for Fortune 100 and 500 clients, will bring a strategic and results-oriented approach to her new role. She will oversee Pavilion Payments' Gaming Operations and Project Management.
news.headline: Pavilion Payments appoints Sarah Perry as VP of Gaming Operations, with 20+ years experience. Excited for her leadership.

news.summary: The special package deal comprises of Wegovy® priced at $199 alongside LifeMD’s Virtual Weight Loss Program for a collective cost of $299 in the first month. The monthly charge will amount to $599 thereafter.
news.headline: LifeMD and Novo Nordisk team up for $299 introductory bundle for Wegovy® self-pay patients, $599/month thereafter.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on May 22, 2025, SCIENTURE HOLDINGS, INC. (NASDAQ: SCNX), a holding company for pharmaceutical operating companies, has reported the resignation of Suren Ajjarapu as CEO and Chairman of the Board. These positions have been taken over by Dr. Shankar Hariharan and Dr. Narasimhan Mani from the current management team. SCIENTURE focuses on developing and distributing specialty products to meet market needs, striving to provide value to patients, physicians, and caregivers.
news.headline: SCIENTURE Holdings, Inc. CEO Suren Ajjarapu steps down; Dr. Shankar Hariharan and Dr. Narasimhan Mani take over leadership roles.

news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Logistic Properties of the Americas (NYSE American: LPA) and EPICO, a firm from Costa Rica focused on raising and deploying private capital in Central America for real estate ventures. LPA aims to quicken the influx of private capital into logistics real estate endeavors through this alliance. The collaboration seeks to speed up the creation and purchase of modern warehouses in the region.
news.headline: Logistic Properties of the Americas partners with EPICO to mobilize private capital for logistics real estate projects in Central America.

news.summary: In New York, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF) - a top player in AI and AR technology for beauty and fashion - is set to showcase its full range of AI-driven tools at VivaTech 2025. They will exhibit how their cutting-edge AI enhances the retail process, providing tailored consumer experiences in beauty, skincare, fashion accessories, and clothing. Through their precise AI technology, Perfect Corp. aims to unify the entire beauty and fashion journey, ensuring seamless connectivity between various touchpoints.
news.headline: Perfect Corp. showcases AI at VivaTech 2025 to enhance beauty & fashion journey; focuses on AI technologies for retail experience.

news.summary: Evolus, Inc., a performance beauty company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EOLS, revealed that the U.S. pivotal study findings for Evolysse™ Form and Evolysse™ Smooth have been published in the Aesthetic Surgery Journal. This journal is recognized for its focus on innovations in aesthetic medicine and surgery. The study, which was multicenter, randomized, controlled, and double-blind, monitored 140 participants for a duration of 12 months.
news.headline: Evolus (NASDAQ: EOLS) released results of a U.S. pivotal study for Evolysse™ Form and Evolysse™ Smooth Injectable Hyaluronic Acid Gels in Aesthetic Surgery Journal.

news.summary: In New York, Bilt, a housing and neighborhood commerce network, revealed a fresh collaboration with Qatar Airways, recognized as the World’s Best Airline by Skytrax eight times. This partnership allows Bilt Members to transfer their Bilt Points to Qatar Airways Privilege Club Avios at a 1:1 ratio, commencing immediately. This marks the start of an expanding partnership between Bilt and Qatar Airways, providing Bilt Members with the opportunity to seamlessly convert their points.
news.headline: Bilt partners with Qatar Airways, allows points transfer at 1:1 ratio. Collaboration with World’s Best Airline begins.

news.summary: Fashion brand Ralph Lauren has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, surpassing expectations. The company also revealed its initial outlook for fiscal year 2026. The exact numbers were not provided in the rephrased text.
news.headline: Ralph Lauren beats Q4 & FY 2025 results, gives FY 2026 outlook.
